clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [PARTNER_A_NAME] and [PARTNER_B_NAME] (each a "Partner" and together the "Parties") for the purpose defined in the Objectives Clause.
The Parties enter this Agreement to pursue [PARTNERSHIP_OBJECTIVE] on the terms set out in this Agreement.

This Agreement does not create a general partnership, corporate entity, or joint venture entity between the Parties, unless the Parties expressly state otherwise in writing. Neither Party has authority to bind the other beyond what is expressly authorized under this Agreement.
Each Party shall contribute to [PARTNERSHIP_OBJECTIVE] as follows: [PARTNER_A_NAME] shall provide [PARTNER_A_CONTRIBUTION]; [PARTNER_B_NAME] shall provide [PARTNER_B_CONTRIBUTION].

Decisions materially affecting [PARTNERSHIP_OBJECTIVE] require the agreement of [DECISION_MAKING_THRESHOLD] of the Parties. If the Parties cannot reach the required threshold within [DEADLOCK_RESOLUTION_PERIOD_DAYS] days, the matter shall be referred to [DEADLOCK_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM].
Each Party's voting weight in decisions under the Decision-Making Clause is [VOTING_WEIGHT_ALLOCATION].
Revenue generated from [PARTNERSHIP_OBJECTIVE] shall be shared between the Parties as follows: [REVENUE_SHARING_FORMULA].

Costs incurred in pursuing [PARTNERSHIP_OBJECTIVE] shall be allocated between the Parties as follows: [EXPENSE_ALLOCATION_FORMULA]. Any cost exceeding [EXPENSE_APPROVAL_THRESHOLD] requires prior approval under the Governance Clause.

Intellectual property created jointly by the Parties specifically for [PARTNERSHIP_OBJECTIVE] shall be owned as follows: [JOINT_IP_OWNERSHIP_TERMS]. Each Party retains ownership of intellectual property it owned before this Agreement.
Neither Party may use the other Party's name, trademark, or brand in connection with [PARTNERSHIP_OBJECTIVE] beyond the term of this Agreement, except with that Party's prior written consent.

Each Party shall keep confidential any non-public information disclosed by the other Party in connection with [PARTNERSHIP_OBJECTIVE] and shall not disclose it to any third party without the disclosing Party's prior written consent, both during and after the term of this Agreement.
Any dispute arising from this Agreement that is not resolved under the Governance Clause shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before either Party initiates litigation.

Either Party may terminate this Agreement by giving [PARTNERSHIP_TERMINATION_NOTICE_PERIOD_DAYS] days' written notice. Upon termination, the Parties shall wind down [PARTNERSHIP_OBJECTIVE] in accordance with the allocation formulas in the Revenue Sharing Clause and Expenses Clause for any activity in progress at the effective date of termination.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW].
The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE].
